name: agent-research
description: Composite skill: research a token + holder by fanning out to three atomic skills — quote (price), score (Passport reputation), infer (LLM verdict). Demonstrates the import-graph: one ENS name resolves to three transitive tools at the bridge.

tools.name: research_token
tools.description: Fan out to three imported skills: get the token's USD price via quote.skilltest.eth, the holder's Gitcoin Passport score via score.skilltest.eth, then ask infer.skilltest.eth (0G Compute) for a one-sentence verdict on whether to interact. Returns all three artefacts plus the verdict.

holder_address.description: Ethereum address of the holder to score
